criterion_scores.name: correct-prioritization
criterion_scores.judge_rationale: SOW is addressed early but ordering includes board deck work before sending SOW; justification muddled, not explicitly tied to being the only hard external deadline.

criterion_scores.name: catches-superseded-instruction
criterion_scores.judge_rationale: Acknowledges Thursday timeline but does not explicitly flag that Wednesday deadline is superseded/void; only says change may affect urgency.

criterion_scores.name: catches-scheduling-conflict
criterion_scores.judge_rationale: Identifies clash between 2pm call and CFO board prep but proposes no concrete alternative, only vague 'decline or find alternative'.

criterion_scores.name: surfaces-not-silently-resolves
criterion_scores.judge_rationale: Surfaces some conflicts but does not state assumption on expense reminder; superseded instruction not explicitly flagged as contradiction.

criterion_scores.name: reply-quality
criterion_scores.judge_rationale: Replies present but generic; Sam reply lacks clear next step.
